tooltip.vtmon.byohmite.tooltip: Allows Byohm to Mega Evolve into Mega Byohm
tooltip.vtmon.byohmite_z.tooltip: Allows Byohm to Mega Evolve into Mega Byohm Z
tooltip.vtmon.schlanghite.tooltip: Allows Schlanghoul to Mega Evolve if it's in its Phantom form
tooltip.vtmon.emerald_sword.tooltip: It used to belong to a legendary hero from eons ago. Despite the passage of time, it has been preserved in perfect condition.
tooltip.vtmon.emerald_hoe.tooltip: Tip: Don't waste your emeralds on a hoe.
tooltip.vtmon.crown.tooltip: Boosts all combat stats of Tokomand and Tokarmy by 50%
tooltip.vtmon.emerald_mace.tooltip: When heavy core and emerald come together, things can get out of control.
